message:
docs: Add Claude tool use integration guide

Comprehensive guide showing how Agent Booster integrates with
Claude's tool use feature as a drop-in replacement for Morph LLM.

Includes:
- Tool definition (edit_file tool)
- Two integration options (npm package vs API server)
- Complete agentic loop implementation
- Performance comparison (1.35-18x speedup)
- Real-world scenarios with metrics
- Best practices (minimal edits, confidence thresholds)
- Migration guide from Morph LLM
- Performance monitoring example

Key insights:
- Claude (thinking): ~1000ms per decision
- Agent Booster (applying): ~1ms per edit (vs 352ms Morph)
- 20 files: 27s → 20s (1.35x faster, $0.20 → $0.00)
- 100 edits: 45s → 10s (4.5x faster, $1.00 → $0.00)

Shows exact integration pattern from https://docs.morphllm.com/quickstart
